name: desktop
description: Nexus Tauri v2 desktop shell — wraps the apps/web dist (macOS-first, unsigned dev build).
author: 42ch
_p1_runtime_deps_note: P1 (sidecar lifecycle) adds @tauri-apps/plugin-shell + @tauri-apps/api as runtime deps for Command.sidecar(). P0 has no desktop-owned JS — the Tauri webview loads apps/web/dist, which detects desktop mode at runtime via window.__TAURI__ and invokes custom commands. No Tauri npm deps belong in apps/web (shared browser+desktop bundle).
